description: Metadata file at the root of a Home Assistant add-ons repository, shown in the Supervisor UI. Based on https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/add-ons/repository

maintainer.description: Name (and optionally contact info) of the repository maintainer

name.description: Name of the repository, shown in the add-on store

url.description: URL to the repository, shown as a link in the add-on store

title: Home Assistant add-on repository.yaml
